title: Intensely Cheesy Slovakian Ham Lasagna
description: A rich and satisfying Slovakian dish featuring ham and a blend of cheeses, made easy with a quick-fix approach and dash-friendly seasoning, incorporating kombu-cold-extract for added depth.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the diced Slovakian ham until lightly browned.
In a large bowl, combine the ricotta cheese, mozzarella cheese, parmesan cheese, kombu-cold-extract, and dash seasoning, and mix well.
Stir in the beaten eggs and set the cheese mixture aside.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a thin layer of the cheese mixture on the bottom.
Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the cheese layer.
Spread half of the remaining cheese mixture over the noodles, followed by half of the sauteed ham.
Repeat the layers, starting with the noodles, then the cheese mixture, and finally the remaining ham.
Top the final layer of noodles with the remaining cheese mixture and sprinkle with additional parmesan cheese if desired.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
